prompt: The style of an original stylized 3D portrait illustration with the aesthetic of a collectible designer figurine and fashion character design. Smooth sculptural plasticity, minimalistic detailing, decorative abstraction, a combination of naive doll-like expressiveness with refined editorial presentation. A matte tactile surface with subtle grain, soft studio lighting, delicate shadows, precise highlights, clean color stylization, a contemporary high-end 3D caricature aesthetic, polished stylized p tortrait sculpture, elegant toylike realism, refined geometric facial design.
